_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of erythrocyte p55/MPP1 as a binding partner of NF2 tumor suppressor protein/Merlin.

_contextSnippet: The calculated KD value between His-p55 and MBP-NF2-N was 3.7 nM...the conformational change model predicted the best curve fitting for the MBP-NF2-N and p55 interaction
details: Successfully measured protein-protein interactions between merlin and p55, calculated KD value of 3.7 nM for His-p55 and MBP-NF2-N interaction using conformational change model
